examples: The truck was trundling along the escarpment of the Zambesi valley.
A pair of noisy Amur falcons nests in an oak on the escarpment.
A house is an escarpment, a door is a refusal, a facade is a wall.
We stayed in a small village at the bottom of a steep, wooded coastal escarpment.
Today what remains of the fort at Albazino is a grassy rectangular escarpment above the roiling river.
